name: Blog
description: A Hawaii adventures travel blog built with content-collections and TanStack Start for Netlify.

packageFileDescriptions.content-collections.ts: Content Collections config: posts schema (title, summary, categories, slug, image, date).
packageFileDescriptions.src/routes/posts.$slug.tsx: Post detail route: single post by slug.
packageFileDescriptions.src/routes/category.$category.tsx: Category route: posts filtered by category.
packageFileDescriptions.src/routes/api.blog-chat.ts: POST handler for blog AI chat with getPostBySlug, getAllBlogPosts tools.
packageFileDescriptions.src/routes/__root.tsx: Root layout: Header, styles, TanStack Devtools.
packageFileDescriptions.src/lib/utils.ts: cn() helper for conditional Tailwind class merging.
packageFileDescriptions.src/lib/blog-tools.ts: AI tools: getPostBySlug, getAllBlogPosts, getPostsByCategory for VacayAssistant.
